programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county; the carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: In Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food; crawfish, alligator and frogs are all on the menu as host Noah Cappe wades through the swamp to try unusual carnival fare.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: From a 69-year-old hot dog joint in Chicago to a father-son noodle shop in New York City, these restaurants have been passed down from generation to generation, proving that big flavor runs in the family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: A terrifying tour of some of the most haunted, or just plain haunting, restaurants in the country from kitschy kitchens that celebrate All Hallows' Eve year-round, to dining in dungeons or grabbing drinks with your monster squad in an old jailhouse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Combing the coast to find some of the best foods from the country's beachside communities; Hawaiian fare in Washington to mouthwatering seafood in Georgia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Hunting down the best drinks and eats for the 5-o'clock crowd from an exotic spot in San Diego to a Chicago bar that puts their booze in the food.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Scouting the country to find the spiciest hot spots; a ghost pepper burger in Texas to a Chicago pizza pie with the name Dance With El Diablo and legendary curry in New York City.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: A Hangover Burger at Austin's 1886 Cafe and Bakery; magical sea fare at The Surf Lodge in Montauk, N.Y.; a Key lime pie margarita at Southernmost Beach Cafe in Key West, Fla.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: After trying almost 500 fairground foods, Noah Cappe becomes a midway culinary expert; now he shares his personal greatest hits by taking a trip down the memory midway of his favorite foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe takes a seat at the table for family dinner, carnival style; he meets the carnival cooks who put a twist on family favorites and transform them into fair food marvels.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is following the smoke signals to the fairground; he's chowing down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Corn chips, cheese and loads of toppings are the base of a simple Tex-Mex dish, but the carnival cooks can get pretty creative; they create some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Scouting the country to find the spiciest hot spots; a ghost pepper burger in Texas to a Chicago pizza pie with the name Dance With El Diablo and legendary curry in New York City.

programme.desc: A Hangover Burger at Austin's 1886 Cafe and Bakery; magical sea fare at The Surf Lodge in Montauk, N.Y.; a Key lime pie margarita at Southernmost Beach Cafe in Key West, Fla.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: After trying almost 500 fairground foods, Noah Cappe becomes a midway culinary expert; now he shares his personal greatest hits by taking a trip down the memory midway of his favorite foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe takes a seat at the table for family dinner, carnival style; he meets the carnival cooks who put a twist on family favorites and transform them into fair food marvels.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is following the smoke signals to the fairground; he's chowing down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Corn chips, cheese and loads of toppings are the base of a simple Tex-Mex dish, but the carnival cooks can get pretty creative; they create some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe investigates the Great American Foodie Fest in Nevada and gets lucky with some monster meat meals like the Katsu Curry Sandwich; at the Kittitas County Fair in Washington, Noah goes local with the Beefalo Burger and Hucklepeach Donuts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Alaska State Fair; tries some local fresh seafood and state secrets, including the Sasquatch Sandwich; Noah discovers that mornings are brighter when the day starts with Country Breakfast Tots and Peach Fritter Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county; the carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: In Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food; crawfish, alligator and frogs are all on the menu as host Noah Cappe wades through the swamp to try unusual carnival fare.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: In the heart of Mozambique's Zambezi Delta, a team of conservationists has overseen one of the largest range expansions of African lions in modern times. Following the reintroduction of 24 lions in 2018, the population has grown to over 100 today.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Olympic medallists Nancy Kerrigan and Kayla Harrison compete with family members; balanced design, kicking it and cutting edge design.

programme.desc: Master dumper divers, Michael and Vinnie compete with DIY soul sisters, Kim and Susan.

programme.desc: Woodstock flippers Jenn and K.T. take on mother-son designing duo Donna and T.J.; distinctive dining, polished industrial and funk-tional design.

programme.sub-title: Vacation Condo in Orange Beach, Alabama
programme.desc: Growing up in the area of Orange Beach, Ala., Jamie and Jamie spent a lot of time on the sand, but their life with three children has made it difficult to catch a break on the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: After four years of living 45 minutes apart, a couple decides to purchase an oceanfront rendezvous in Point Pleasant Beach, N.J., where they can also produce rental income when they're not there.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Jodi and Michael are currently renting a home in Virginia Beach, Va.; they have a baby on the way and are finally ready to purchase a place of their own, as long as it's close to the water.

programme.desc: A firefighter from Madison, Wis., looks for a permanent home on nearby Lake Wisconsin where he can unwind; he wants to have space for entertaining family and friends, so his sister-in-law joins him on the hunt as he tries to make his dream a reality.

programme.desc: A Navy pilot enlists the help of his Naval Academy roommate to find a slice of paradise on Oahu; he hopes to find a place that's move-in ready, with air conditioning, that is big enough for himself, his dog and a future family.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: House Hunters
